title: Cars24 South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cars24 South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cars24 South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
